content.content: Clarify Fact Only as the sole fact-boundary hard gate and Agent Rule as the fact-grounded engineering, safety, and verification gate without renaming either skill.

content: remove duplicated fact-boundary ownership from skills/agent-rule/SKILL.md and make its dependency on fact-only explicit
align only active skill routing or references that conflict with the clarified ownership
add or update focused regression tests
renaming or deleting either skill or directory
changing lifecycle phases or Human approval boundaries

content.content: A validated Agent Factory skill set where fact-only owns fact classification and ambiguity hard stops, while agent-rule consumes that gate and owns critical engineering action, safety, and verification rules.
